MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Apr-03-2003 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-03-2003 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day. Commissioner: Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: P. Dias, Reporter: Diana Padilla. Arnold W. Evje, Esq. represented Plaintiff, California Masonic Memorial Temple and Defendant Trisha Quinn appeared in pro per. The case settled per stipulation of parties per the record. Trial date is vacated.
